Name: Number of process instances where 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' occurs at least once

Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' that have a performance value above the median variant performance

Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs
